title: TemporalArcReferenceArray
description: Base TARA schema. A bounded structured record of what one temporal arc can hand to another.

sourceArc.description: Identifier of the arc that emitted this array

targetArc.description: Identifier of the arc that will consume this array

timeMarker.description: Timestamp or tick at which this array was emitted

stateSummary.description: Compressed representation of source-arc state at emission time

confidence.description: How much the target arc should trust this representation

driftEstimate.description: Expected rate of staleness — how fast the source is diverging from this snapshot

reconstructionTarget.description: What the target arc is trying to recover from this array

lossNotes.description: Explicit record of what was dropped or compressed away
